title: Lesson 53: Past Tense (line): Could, Had and Would
concepts: Here we'll look at how to say what we could have done, had done and would have done!

sentences.english: I was able to / I could (paste)
We were able to / I could (paste)

sentences.spanish: No podía hacerlo porque no tenía el tiempo
sentences.english: I couldn't do it because I didn't have the time

sentences.spanish: Él quería cenar conmigo pero ya yo había cenado
sentences.english: He wanted to dine with me but I had already dined

sentences.spanish: Él quería cenar conmigo pero ya había cenado
sentences.english: He wanted to dine with me but I had already dined

sentences.spanish: Él quería cenar conmigo pero ya había cenado
sentences.english: He wanted to dine with me but he had already dined

sentences.spanish: Él quería cenar conmigo pero ya había cenado
sentences.english: He wanted to dine with me but she had already dined

sentences.spanish: Él lo buscaba por que yo lo había perdido
sentences.english: He wanted to dine with me but I had already dined
I would have got lost (lost myself)
